vocab.meaning: bắt đầu dấn thân vào một sự nghiệp
vocab.example: After graduating last year, I decided to embark on a career in digital marketing.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi bằng cao học (thạc sĩ/tiến sĩ)
vocab.example: I am currently hitting the books to pursue a postgraduate degree in International Law.

vocab.meaning: thăng tiến trong nấc thang sự nghiệp (công ty)
vocab.example: I'm working as a junior analyst, hoping to climb the corporate ladder within the next five years.

vocab.meaning: theo học chuyên ngành chính là
vocab.example: As a sophomore at university, I major in Computer Science with a focus on Artificial Intelligence.

vocab.meaning: một nghề nghiệp có thu nhập cao/béo bở
vocab.example: I'm training to become a software architect, which is widely considered a lucrative profession these days.

vocab.meaning: có được chứng chỉ/sự công nhận nghề nghiệp chuyên môn
vocab.example: I am working at an accounting firm while studying to gain professional accreditation as a CPA.
Instead of a traditional university, I opted for vocational training to get specialized skills in culinary arts.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng giữa công việc và cuộc sống
vocab.example: I recently switched jobs because my previous role offered absolutely no work-life balance.

vocab.meaning: khối lượng công việc nặng nề/gây mệt mỏi
vocab.example: Being a final-year student involves a taxing workload, especially with the dissertation looming.
I have a calling for social work, so I am currently employed in the non-profit sector.
